chain.thought: Explanation: To find how many people are still at the place, count the rows with an empty departure date. Only row 9 (Ravil Mingazov) has no departure date, so there is 1 person still at the place.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
Interpreting "at some place" as those still present (no departure date), we count rows with a blank departure date. Only row 9 (Ravil Mingazov) has no departure date; all others list 2004-02-27 or 2006-11-17. Thus, the count is 1, matching the Prediction Answer.
